__comment: Aiven JDBC sink: Kafka(Avro) -> PostgreSQL. Create on the DEDICATED Kafka Connect service. Fill connection.* from the Postgres service connection info and value.converter.schema.registry.* from the Kafka service's schema registry (Karapace). auto.create builds the github_events table from the Avro schema (table.name.format maps topic github-events -> table github_events).
name: github-events-pg-sink
